examples.title: Recursive Fibonacci Function
examples.description: A recursive function to calculate the nth Fibonacci number
examples.code:
FUNCTION fibonacci(n)
  IF n <= 1 THEN
    RETURN n
  ELSE
    RETURN fibonacci(n-1) + fibonacci(n-2)
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This function uses recursion to calculate the nth Fibonacci number.
